title: CodeRabbit
author: CodeRabbit
copyText:
## Editorial notes

CodeRabbit fits teams that want AI review support directly in the pull request loop rather than only inside an editor.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
detailMarkdown:
# CodeRabbit

AI code review platform for pull request summaries, review comments, repository context, and engineering feedback loops.

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: no package download
- Review: unclaimed
seoDescription: CodeRabbit provides AI code review for pull requests, summaries, comments, repository context, and feedback loops. HeyClaude adds source links, install...
